headline: Nvidia Is Giving These 6 Stocks a Boost. Not One Is a Chip Maker.
summary: Nvidia  is helping a lot of stocks this week besides  Marvell  It’s yet another example of how AI runs the market and creates opportunities for companies that aren’t in tech.  Over the weekend, at a trade show in Taiwan, Nvidia got Wall Street primed by introducing several products, including its new, more powerful Vera CPU, which needs liquid cooling.  At the conference, Nvidia also announced a partnership with nVent and  Siemens  The trio released a blueprint for 100-megawatt AI data centers that provides Siemens’ electrical frameworks and nVent’s plumbing.

headline: The Boring Sector Quietly Powering the Entire AI Revolution
summary: Everyone wants to own NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA). Almost nobody talks about who pours the concrete, runs the wires, and keeps the chips from melting.
